## Checklist

- [ ] Engine tests pass (`cd engine && uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Renderer typechecks + builds (`cd apps/desktop && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build`)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal data in the diff
- [ ] Changelog note added if this is a user-facing change
